name: kenobi
documentation:
KenobiDB is a small document based DB, supporting very simple
usage including insertion, removal and basic search. Made with YAML.
Written by Harrison Erd (https://patx.github.io/)
Website: https://patx.github.io/kenobi/

modules.name: kenobi
documentation:
KenobiDB is a small document based DB, supporting very simple
usage including insertion, removal and basic search.
Written by Harrison Erd (https://patx.github.io/)
https://patx.github.io/kenobi/

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.__init__
documentation:
Creates a database object and loads the data from the location
path. If the file does not exist it will be created. Also allows
you to set auto_save to True or False (default=False). If auto_save
is set to True the database is written to file after every change.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.save_db
documentation: Save the database, ensuring thread and process safety.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.insert
documentation: Add a document (a python dict) to the database and return True.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.insert_many
documentation: Add a list of documents to the database and return True.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.remove
documentation: Remove document(s) with the matching key: value pair.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.update
documentation: Update a document, takes three arguments.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.purge
documentation: Remove all documents from the database, return True.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.all
documentation: Return a list of all documents in the database.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.search
documentation: Return a list of documents with key: value pairs matching.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.find_any
documentation: Return a list of documents with values including any matches.

methods.name: kenobi.KenobiDB.find_all
documentation: Return a list of documents with values including all matches.
